portfolios.name: p01_eur_fast_long_top2
portfolios.description: Single best EURUSD fast long policy from OOF trading eval.

portfolios.name: p02_xau_active_short_top10
portfolios.description: Single XAU active short policy close to PF 1.5.

portfolios.name: p03_mixed_eur_fast_xau_active
portfolios.description: Diversified EUR fast long plus XAU active short.

portfolios.name: p04_xau_dual
portfolios.description: XAU active short plus XAU runner long, controlled by same-symbol risk rules.

portfolios.name: p05_broad_mixed_probe
portfolios.description: Broader experimental mix; use for diagnostics, not direct deployment.

portfolios.name: p06_eurusd_buy_sell_probe
portfolios.description: EURUSD side-complete probe: current best buy plus optional EURUSD sell candidate. The short component is optional until it is trained/evaluated.

portfolios.name: p07_xau_buy_sell_core
portfolios.description: XAUUSD side-complete core: runner long buy plus active short sell.

portfolios.name: p08_side_complete_core_optional
portfolios.description: Four-side system template: EURUSD buy/sell and XAUUSD buy/sell. EURUSD sell is optional until trained and should be made required before final live acceptance.

portfolios.name: p09_eur_short_probe_optional
portfolios.description: Diagnostic EURUSD short-only template; optional because this job may not have been trained/evaluated yet.

portfolios.name: p10_eur_short_top5_probe_optional
portfolios.description: Diagnostic EURUSD short-only wider top-5-percent template; optional because this job may not have been trained/evaluated yet.

policies.name: no_controls_diagnostic
policies.description: Diagnostic ceiling: accepts all candidate trades except no live risk caps. Not deployment-ready.

policies.name: user_max4sym_open8
policies.description: User-requested baseline: max 4 trades per symbol/day and max 8 simultaneous open trades.

policies.name: non_overlap_same_symbol
policies.description: Allows repeated same-symbol trades only after the previous same-symbol trade has exited.

policies.name: max2_symbol_day
policies.description: More conservative symbol cap: max 2 trades per symbol/day, max 8 open trades.

policies.name: session_cap
policies.description: Session-aware cap: max 4 per symbol/day plus max 1 per symbol/session.

policies.name: daily_loss_guard
policies.description: User max4/open8 plus tighter stop after 2 known closed losses in the same day.

setups.description: EURUSD buy context around AH/ATR2 continuation: Asia-high reclaim/expansion in overlap/late overlap.
EURUSD buy context around London block 3 pullback/low reclaim with RSI <= about 52.
EURUSD buy context around overlap pullback near confirmed zigzag low, excluding weak market-regime 2.
EURUSD short context around late-NY Tuesday/Friday exhaustion after upside pressure.
EURUSD short context around late-NY high-ATR exhaustion.
EURUSD short context around London weakness / loss of momentum.
XAU buy context around Asia-low rejection with low RSI and non-deteriorating momentum.
XAU buy context around H1-up high-ATR continuation.
XAU buy discovery context: H1-up breakout/pullback near confirmed swing low.
XAU short context around DC no-Friday low-volatility continuation.
XAU short discovery context: active session breakdown below Asia low or negative session return.
XAU short discovery context: reversal/weakness near confirmed swing high.
Redesigned EURUSD buy: overlap/late-overlap momentum after Asia-high reclaim; distinct from pullback setups.
Redesigned EURUSD buy: relative-strength continuation using normalized market_x/market_y, not Asia-low pullback.
Redesigned EURUSD sell: London/overlap bearish breakdown, different from late-NY exhaustion.
Redesigned EURUSD sell: H1 downtrend continuation across London/overlap, separate from overbought late-NY shorts.
Redesigned XAU buy: broad H1-up momentum continuation; candidate replacement for weak/sparse breakout-pullback.
Redesigned XAU buy: H1-up plus supportive inverse-DXY/relative context; distinct from Asia-low rejection.
Redesigned XAU sell: Asia-low failure/breakdown; replacement candidate for sparse active-breakdown context.
Redesigned XAU sell: H1-down continuation; distinct from DC/no-Friday and reversal structures.
Redesigned XAU buy: Asia-high reclaim with supportive inverse-DXY context; distinct from H1-up and broad momentum continuation.
Redesigned XAU buy: London/early-overlap pullback reclaim around zigzag-low context; distinct from DXY trend and momentum continuation.
Redesigned XAU sell: USD-strength pressure via weak inverse-DXY with non-positive H1 trend; distinct from DC/no-Friday and reversal.
Redesigned XAU sell: London/early-overlap rejection near zigzag-high context; distinct from H1-down continuation and DXY pressure.

setup_inventory.redesign_note: Weak/sparse setups are not only relaxed; alternative, structurally different setup hypotheses are added for replacement testing.

setup_inventory_portfolio.notes: Portfolio evaluation from setup-inventory best viable policies. The 12-core portfolio targets 3 setup candidates for each symbol/side: EURUSD long, EURUSD short, XAUUSD long, XAUUSD short.

risk_plans.name: uniform
risk_plans.description: Same fixed fractional risk for every selected trade.

risk_plans.name: xau_75pct
risk_plans.description: Keep EUR risk unchanged and reduce XAUUSD trade risk to 75%.

risk_plans.name: xau_50pct
risk_plans.description: Keep EUR risk unchanged and reduce XAUUSD trade risk to 50%.

risk_plans.name: short_75pct
risk_plans.description: Reduce all short-side risk to 75% for downside-cluster diagnostics.

risk_plans.name: xau_sell_50pct
risk_plans.description: Reduce only XAUUSD short-side exposure to 50%.

risk_plans.name: asia_reclaim_half
risk_plans.description: Reduce the weakest/conditional XAU buy setup risk to 50%.

inventory_ror_optimizer.notes: Post-portfolio risk-of-ruin optimizer. It does not change entry logic; it sweeps risk per trade and optional exposure weights on already selected inventory portfolio trades.
